name: Subspace | Zenless Zone Zero |
description:
“The world bows to my will! Hahahaha!"

Unrelated, but forgive me for Medkiss being private. I was informed that he’s a self insert made by Soda, who isn’t comfortable with anyone doing anything to their versions of characters. I didn’t mean to disrespect the wishes of Soda, so I took it upon myself to private it, just in case.

Pls don’t hate me for that.

Aaaanywho, I randomly came up with this idea. Don’t think either characters from either Fandom would survive...but that’s just me.

I actually had this idea for months, and I feel comfy enough to show it to you all.
creator: Lustfullavender
